title: Sable: Ragdoll Corpse
description: Leave a physical ragdoll corpse behind on death!
body:
On death, the player now leaves a simulated ragdoll corpse behind, with all items safely inside. You can drag, throw and even recover it with create aeronautics contraptions!

# Features

## Fully simulated based on sable, they can tumble and react to the world

![ragdoll corpse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/724338387f78a1f2429bca7b66b251406f151cb4.png)
![a corpse being rescued from the nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19407505e632145ba52c77652f8e86f30d4e589.png)
## Items are safe on the ragdoll's internal inventory
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85ca869564c699f7ea9b6ff585d4d7c252e7fe34_0.webp)

## Recovery compass points to the last corpse
![recovery compass compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8521f6ef0d45f6e7abae8d903b23dd401085d3bb.png)


## Full Acessories/curios compatibility
![curios/accessories compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b9a15c479381696d9a4d21d0126b4c5f28e03bc.png)
